insight.more: more in expenses vs last month
insight.less: less in expenses vs last month

modal.savingsHint: This amount will be added to the selected goal

tracker.whyFeeling: What made you feel that way?
tracker.moodMonth: Your mood this month has been
tracker.todayHabits: What do you have to do today?
tracker.deleteConfirmStart: Are you sure you want to delete

subscription.title: Subscription
subscription.descPremium: Unlimited budgets and all features active.
subscription.descFree: Up to 3 budgets per month. Go premium to unlock everything.
subscription.featureCalendar: Classes and groups in the calendar
subscription.msgWelcomePremium: Welcome to Premium! Your account is now active.
subscription.msgCancelled: Payment cancelled. You can try again whenever you want.

language.title: Language
language.rowDesc: Select the language in which the app is displayed.

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.rowDesc: Customize the look of the app.

account.title: Account
account.passwordDesc: You will receive an email to confirm the change.
account.passwordConfirmMsg: Check your email to confirm the change.

home.label: Home
home.meta: Discover the main dashboard with your daily summary.
home.step1Desc: See today's greeting, date and a quick snapshot of your monthly finances.
home.step2Desc: Quick view of the current week with today's events and upcoming ones.
home.step3Desc: Overview of income, expenses and progress toward your savings goals.
home.step4Desc: Quick access to your recent notes and pending to-do list.

calendar.label: Calendar
calendar.meta: Explore the month, week and day views.
calendar.monthDesc: The calendar shows the full month with all your events at a glance.
calendar.navDesc: Use the arrows to move to the previous or next month.
calendar.daysDesc: Click any day to see its events. The selected day is highlighted.
calendar.sheetDesc: Tap the handle to open or close this panel. Inside you will find events organised by day, week and month.
calendar.eventosDesc: Here you can see the events for the selected day, this week and this month. Tap any one to view its detail.
calendar.addBtnDesc: Tap this button to create a new event: add a title, date, time and an optional description.
calendar.weekDesc: Plan your week hour by hour with the column view.
calendar.dayDesc: Full detail for a single day: all events in chronological order.

notes.label: Notes
notes.meta: Learn to organise notes by category and manage tasks.
notes.notesOverviewDesc: Create and organise all your notes here. Each one can have a title, content and a category.
notes.categoriesDesc: Tap a category to filter your notes instantly. Use the '+' button to create your own categories.
notes.gridDesc: Tap any note to open and edit it. The trash icon deletes the note directly.
notes.actionsDesc: The magnifier opens the search bar to find notes by text. The '+' button opens the modal to create a new note.
notes.todoOverviewDesc: Next to your notes you have a full task list with custom lists and smart sorting.
notes.listsDesc: Organise your tasks into separate lists. Tap '+' to create a new list and drag the tabs to reorder them.
notes.quickAddDesc: Type here and press Enter to add a task instantly without opening any modal.
notes.subItemDesc: Hover over any task to reveal the sub-task field. Type and press Enter to add a nested item.
notes.smartSortDesc: Assign importance and difficulty to each task and let an algorithm sort them by priority automatically.

finance.label: Finances
finance.meta: Navigate the overview, transactions and savings sections.
finance.cardsDesc: Three cards showing your total balance, monthly expenses and income. The percentage compares against last month.
finance.insightDesc: This indicator tells you whether you spent more or less than last month, with the percentage difference.
finance.chartDesc: The bar chart shows income and expenses over the past months so you can spot trends at a glance.
finance.recentDesc: Your latest transactions appear here. Tap any one to see its detail or use the '+' button to add a new one.
finance.txSummaryDesc: Total income and expenses for the current month. Tap the button to record a new movement.
finance.txFilterDesc: Use these filters to see only transactions from a specific category: food, housing, entertainment and more.
finance.txGroupDesc: Transactions are grouped by date. Tap any one to view its detail or edit it.
finance.savingsProgressDesc: The global bar shows how much you have saved in total against the combined target of all your goals.
finance.goalsGridDesc: Each card represents a savings goal with its progress, amount saved and estimated time to completion.
finance.addGoalDesc: Tap here to define a new savings goal: give it a name, a colour and the amount you want to reach.

tracker.label: Tracker
tracker.meta: Use habit tracking and mood logging.
tracker.habitOverviewDesc: Track your daily habits here: create as many as you like and check them off each day.
tracker.habitTodayDesc: Tap a habit to mark it as done. The dots below each one show your progress this week.
tracker.habitGridDesc: This grid shows at a glance which days of the month you completed each habit.
tracker.habitActionsDesc: Tap '+' to create a new habit. Use the select icon to pick multiple habits and delete them.
tracker.moodOverviewDesc: Log how you feel each day and add a note with the reason.
tracker.moodSelectDesc: Choose one or more emotions that reflect how you feel today and write an optional note.
tracker.moodCalDesc: Tap any past day to see the emotion and note you logged on that day.
tracker.moodStreakDesc: See how many consecutive days you have logged your mood. Keep it going!

global.label: Full tour
global.meta: Walk through the entire app from start to finish.

todo.deleteListDesc: What do you want to do with the tasks in this list?
todo.deleteKeepItems: Delete list, keep tasks in All

sort.title: Smart sort
sort.setupDesc: Assign importance and difficulty to each task, then choose an algorithm to sort them.
sort.previewDesc: Preview the proposed order. Confirm to save.
sort.jumpingCatDesc: Alternates between tasks of different importance levels. Ideal for not overwhelming yourself with all critical tasks at once.
sort.balancedFlowDesc: Simulates your energy level throughout the day: alternates difficult and easy tasks to maintain a sustainable pace without burnout spikes.
sort.pilaScoreDesc: Calculates a combined score of importance and difficulty. Tasks with the highest total score go first.

login.subtitle: Sign in to access your personal space.
login.passwordError: Password must be at least 6 characters.

register.checkEmailDesc: We've sent a verification link to your email. Activate your account and then sign in.
register.subtitle: It's free. No credit card required.
register.name: Name
register.passwordError: Password must be at least 6 characters.

forgot.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to reset it.
forgot.successDesc: If an account exists with that email, you'll receive a link to reset your password.

reset.subtitle: Choose a secure password for your account.
reset.successDesc: You can now sign in with your new password.

help.pageSubtitle: Have a problem or suggestion? Tell us about it.
help.ticketSentDesc: We've received your message. We'll get back to you as soon as possible.
help.subject: Subject
help.subjectPlaceholder: Briefly describe the problem or suggestion
help.descriptionPlaceholder: Explain your problem, bug or suggestion in detail…
help.noTickets: You haven't submitted any tickets yet.

admin.previewDesc: Simulate how a user sees the app

landing.heroSubtitle: Agenda, finances, notes and habits in a single app designed for your daily life.
landing.feat1Desc: Organise your events with daily, weekly and monthly views. Never miss an appointment.
landing.feat2Desc: Track expenses, income and savings goals. Your finances, under control.
landing.feat3Desc: Write and organise your ideas. Find any note instantly.
landing.feat4Desc: Track habits and mood. Small steps, big changes.
landing.ctaSubtitle: Create your free account and organise your life from today.
